title: elleanthus aurantiacus
intro: Elleanthus aurantiacus, also known as the Orange Elleanthus or Firecracker Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Elleanthus aurantiacus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. Elleanthus aurantiacus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
